title: moos Platform Preset
description: Declarative runtime launch recipe for a moos kernel environment. Validated by this schema. See platform/README.md for full contract documentation.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for compatibility checking. Increment on breaking field changes.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for the preset.

platform.description: Target operating system for this preset.

description.description: Human-readable purpose statement for the preset.

launcher.description: Launch shape. Exactly one variant must be used: binary or service.

oneOf.title: binary
oneOf.description: Local workstation binary execution. Used for local development on Windows.

type.description: Identifies this as a direct binary launch.

path.description: Relative path to the compiled binary. Windows example: .\moos-kernel.exe

fallback.description: Command to use when the compiled binary is absent. Example: go run ./cmd/kernel

oneOf.title: service
oneOf.description: Managed runtime execution. Used for systemd or container environments.

type.description: Identifies this as a managed service launch.

binary.description: Relative path to the binary. Unix example: ./moos-kernel

workingDirectory.description: Working directory for the service runtime. Example: /opt/moos

env.description: Environment variable bindings. Secret values MUST use ${VAR_NAME} placeholder syntax. Resolved values must never be committed.

MOOS_HTTP_PORT.description: HTTP data compatibility port. Preserved value: 8000.

MOOS_NANOCLAW_PORT.description: NanoClaw bridge compatibility port. Preserved value: 18789.

MOOS_DATABASE_URL.description: Postgres connection URL. Required when MOOS_KERNEL_STORE=postgres. Password field MUST be a ${VAR} binding, not a literal value.

services.description: Declarative service dependency expectations for this runtime environment.

database.description: Database provisioning model. none = no database dependency; external-postgres = must exist before launch; managed-postgres = platform provisions it.

migrations.description: Migration execution policy. true = run on every start; predeploy = run before service starts; false = never run.

metrics.description: Whether metrics collection is active for this runtime.

notes.description: Human-readable operational context notes. At least one is required.
